name: flagd
description: Feature flag daemon with a Unix philosophy. Reference OpenFeature-compliant backend supporting HTTP/gRPC evaluation, targeting rules and OpenTelemetry tracing.

seo.title: flagd — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: flagd: Feature flag daemon with a Unix philosophy. Reference OpenFeature-compliant backend supporting HTTP/gRPC evaluation, targeting rules and OpenTelemetry tr

when_to_use: gRPC and HTTP flag evaluation for polyglot services
Targeting rules evaluated locally without remote latency
OpenTelemetry tracing of every flag evaluation

pros: Reference OpenFeature backend with clean Unix design
HTTP and gRPC evaluation, flexible targeting
OpenTelemetry tracing out of the box
Easy to self-host as a daemon
cons: Not a product; you build dashboards yourself
Smaller feature set than mature SaaS flag tools
review.verdict: Solid default flag daemon if youre already committing to OpenFeature; not a turnkey product.
review.best_for: Platform teams standardizing on OpenFeature with self-hosting
review.not_for: Teams that need a polished no-code flag dashboard

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
